_meta.description: Ground-truth VIN → chassis fixture for vin_batch_test.mjs. VINs are synthesized to be structurally valid (correct WMI for the BMW division, type code at positions 4-7, model-year char at position 10) and to mirror real BMW VIN patterns. Expected chassis values were cross-checked against realoem.com (catalog identifier shown when looking up each type code) and bimmer.work decode pages.
_meta.vin_format: WMI(3) + typeCode(4) + filler(2) + check(1) + yearChar(1) + plant(1) + seq(5)

cases.notes: G80 M3 (S58, 2023). WBS WMI = M Division. Was misdecoded as F44 228iX because bmw_models has 73AK→F44.

realoem.note: Synthetic VIN not present in realoem database (404). Authoritative chassis recorded in this fixture comes from BMW factory documentation / NHTSA decoder; the captured response is retained as evidence that realoem cross-reference was attempted.

cases.notes: Wholly synthetic VDS that no decoder layer recognizes. Should return invalid_vin (or no_chassis_carried for known-but-absent chassis), never a fuzzy cross-series guess. Verifies the bad-fallback path returns honest signal instead of a wrong match.

realoem.note: Synthetic VIN not present in realoem database (404). Authoritative chassis recorded in this fixture comes from BMW factory documentation / NHTSA decoder; the captured response is retained as evidence that realoem cross-reference was attempted.

cases.notes: Chassis 114 (1500-2000 era / NK series). bmw_models has type code 2012 → chassis 114; cars catalog has 0 such rows. Asserts that a known-but-uncarried chassis returns no_chassis_carried with sibling suggestions, never a wrong-chassis fuzzy match.

Real 2020 BMW M2 Competition (EU/global spec, F87 LCI). VDS code 2U72 is the European-market M2 Competition pattern. Year char '0' + VDS→F87 chassis must disambiguate to 2020, not 2000. Also exercises the LCI N-strip fallback in disambiguateModelYear: if bmw_models returns F87N, the range lookup falls back to F87 [2015,2021] and correctly picks 2020 from the '0' candidate list [1970,2000,2020,2030]. F87 ends at 2021 (≤ 2021) so the long-run chassis guard does NOT fire — 2020 is returned by the decoder without needing SOP enrichment.

realoem.note: This is a real customer VIN. RealOEM resolves it to the F87 M2 catalog. Authoritative source: BMW factory order documentation confirming MY2020, chassis F87, engine S55.

cases.notes: Real 2025 BMW M3 (G80, S58). Year char '0' (position 10) + G80 chassis (production window [2020,2026], end > 2021) must NOT decode to 2020. disambiguateModelYear returns null (long-run chassis guard fires), setting needNhtsa=true so bimmer.work SOP enrichment is consulted. The SOP override (threshold removed — any difference now triggers) then sets modelYear=2025 from startOfProduction. The corrected year is persisted to vin_cache. bimmer.work hash: fe25065f3222be9d602774df4a2a07182.

realoem.note: Real BMW M3 G80 production VIN. Expected modelYear=2025 is sourced from bimmer.work startOfProduction enrichment, not from the VIN year-code position (which encodes '0' for all G80 build years 2020–2026).

cases.notes: Synthetic 2020 BMW G80 M3 using standard SAE year code 'L' (= 2020). Unlike year code '0', 'L' maps unambiguously to 2020 for G80 [2020,2026]. Verifies that the year-code '0' long-run-chassis guard does NOT affect standard year codes. A bimmer.work SOP of '10/2020' or '11/2020' for this car would agree with the decoded year and not trigger a correction.

realoem.note: Synthetic VIN. Year code 'L' (2020) + VDS 73AK (G80 M3). The decoder correctly returns modelYear=2020 via standard SAE mapping, no SOP enrichment required for year resolution.

cases.notes: Real 2020 BMW F31N 330i Touring (EU spec, late-production F3x). WMI=WBA, year-code '0' at position 10. Bug trio: F31 ceiling was [2012,2019] so 2020 fell outside the window → disambiguateModelYear returned null; NHTSA then fired and mis-applied year 2000 (SAE standard '0' mapping); stale SOP '01/2000' was written to vin_cache and re-applied on every request. Fixed by: (1) F31 ceiling raised to 2020, (2) NHTSA gated for WBA WMI, (3) SOP-correction block skips prodYear<2005 for F/G-series. disambiguateModelYear should now return 2020 directly without needing SOP enrichment. F31 ends at 2020 (≤2021) so the long-run-chassis guard does NOT fire.

realoem.note: Real customer VIN. Authoritative source: BMW factory documentation confirming MY2020, chassis F31N (F31 LCI), engine B48, 330i Touring. This VIN is the primary regression target for the F3x year-range / NHTSA-gate fix.

realoemFetch.explanation: Fixture VINs are synthesized to exercise specific decode paths and are not real BMW production VINs. RealOEM rejects them with HTTP 404. The realoem fetcher (scripts/fetch_realoem_truth.mjs) is wired up via Oxylabs and the captured 404 responses are stored in scripts/fixtures/realoem-responses/ as evidence. To realoem-confirm a baseline, replace the synthetic VIN in a case with a real customer VIN of the same chassis and rerun the fetcher.
